source: PokéAPI REST summarized for offline runtime use

abilities.name: Reckless
abilities.effect: Strengthens recoil moves to 1.2× their power.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up moves that have recoil damage.

abilities.name: Guts
abilities.effect: Increases Attack to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
abilities.flavor_text: It's so gutsy that having a status condition boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat.

abilities.name: Defiant
abilities.effect: Raises Attack two stages upon having any stat lowered.
abilities.flavor_text: If the Pokémon has any stat lowered by an opposing Pokémon, its Attack stat will be boosted sharply.

abilities.name: Suction Cups
abilities.effect: Prevents being forced out of battle by other Pokémon's moves.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon uses suction cups to stay in one spot. This protects it from moves and items that would force it to switch out.

abilities.name: Sniper
abilities.effect: Strengthens critical hits to inflict 3× damage rather than 2×.
abilities.flavor_text: If the Pokémon's attack lands a critical hit, the attack is powered up even further.

abilities.name: Moody
abilities.effect: Raises a random stat two stages and lowers another one stage after each turn.
abilities.flavor_text: Every turn, one of the Pokémon's stats will be boosted sharply but another stat will be lowered.

abilities.name: Chlorophyll
abilities.effect: Doubles Speed during strong sunlight.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in harsh sunlight.

abilities.name: Run Away
abilities.effect: Ensures success fleeing from wild battles.
abilities.flavor_text: Enables a sure getaway from wild Pokémon.

abilities.name: Defiant
abilities.effect: Raises Attack two stages upon having any stat lowered.
abilities.flavor_text: If the Pokémon has any stat lowered by an opposing Pokémon, its Attack stat will be boosted sharply.

abilities.name: Sturdy
abilities.effect: Prevents being KOed from full HP, leaving 1 HP instead.  Protects against the one-hit KO moves regardless of HP.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon cannot be knocked out by a single hit as long as its HP is full. One-hit KO moves will also fail to knock it out.

abilities.name: Mold Breaker
abilities.effect: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent a move.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's moves are unimpeded by the Ability of the target.

abilities.name: Water Absorb
abilities.effect: Absorbs Water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
abilities.flavor_text: If hit by a Water-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

abilities.name: Aroma Veil
abilities.effect: Protects allies against moves that affect their mental state.
abilities.flavor_text: Protects the Pokémon and its allies from effects that prevent the use of moves.

abilities.name: Gluttony
abilities.effect: Makes the Pokémon eat any held Berry triggered by low HP below 1/2 its max HP.
abilities.flavor_text: If the Pokémon is holding a Berry to be eaten when its HP is low, it will instead eat the Berry when its HP drops to half or less.

abilities.name: Thick Fat
abilities.effect: Halves damage from Fire and Ice moves.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon is protected by a layer of thick fat, which halves the damage taken from Fire- and Ice-type moves.

abilities.name: Lingering Aroma
abilities.effect: Contact changes the attacker's Ability to Lingering Aroma.
abilities.flavor_text: Contact with the Pokémon changes the attacker's Ability to Lingering Aroma.

abilities.name: Gluttony
abilities.effect: Makes the Pokémon eat any held Berry triggered by low HP below 1/2 its max HP.
abilities.flavor_text: If the Pokémon is holding a Berry to be eaten when its HP is low, it will instead eat the Berry when its HP drops to half or less.

abilities.name: Thick Fat
abilities.effect: Halves damage from Fire and Ice moves.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon is protected by a layer of thick fat, which halves the damage taken from Fire- and Ice-type moves.

abilities.name: Toxic Chain
abilities.effect: May cause bad poisoning when the Pokémon hits an opponent with a move.
abilities.flavor_text: The power of the Pokémon's toxic chain may badly poison any target the Pokémon hits with a move

abilities.name: Guard Dog
abilities.effect: Boosts Attack if intimidated, and prevents being forced to switch out.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat if intimidated. Moves and items that would force the Pokémon to switch out also fail to work.

abilities.name: Swift Swim
abilities.effect: Doubles Speed during rain.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in rain.

abilities.name: Shell Armor
abilities.effect: Protects against critical hits.
abilities.flavor_text: A hard shell protects the Pokémon from critical hits.

abilities.name: Weak Armor
abilities.effect: Raises Speed and lowers Defense by one stage each upon being hit by a physical move.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's Defense stat is lowered when it takes damage from physical moves, but its Speed stat is sharply boosted.

abilities.name: Inner Focus
abilities.effect: Prevents flinching.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon's intense focus prevents it from flinching or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: Telepathy
abilities.effect: Protects against friendly Pokémon's damaging moves.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon anticipates and dodges the attacks of its allies.

abilities.name: Symbiosis
abilities.effect: Passes the bearer's held item to an ally when the ally uses up its item.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon passes its held item to an ally that has used up an item.

abilities.name: Swarm
abilities.effect: Strengthens Bug moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up Bug-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.

abilities.name: Frisk
abilities.effect: Reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.
abilities.flavor_text: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon can check an opposing Pokémon's held item.

abilities.name: Telepathy
abilities.effect: Protects against friendly Pokémon's damaging moves.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon anticipates and dodges the attacks of its allies.

abilities.effect: Strengthens Bug moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up Bug-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.

abilities.effect: Reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.

abilities.effect: Protects against friendly Pokémon's damaging moves.

abilities.name: Dancer
abilities.effect: Whenever another Pokémon uses a dance move, this Pokémon will use the same move immediately afterwards.
abilities.flavor_text: Whenever a dance move is used in battle, the Pokémon will copy the user to immediately perform that dance move itself.

abilities.name: Earth Eater
abilities.effect: Restores HP when hit by a Ground-type move.
abilities.flavor_text: If hit by a Ground-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

abilities.name: Sand Veil
abilities.effect: Increases evasion to 1.25× during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon's evasiveness in a sandstorm.

abilities.name: Torrent
abilities.effect: Strengthens Water moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up Water-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.

abilities.name: Shell Armor
abilities.effect: Protects against critical hits.
abilities.flavor_text: A hard shell protects the Pokémon from critical hits.

abilities.name: Poison Point
abilities.effect: Has a 30% chance of poisoning attacking Pokémon on contact.
abilities.flavor_text: Contact with the Pokémon may poison the attacker.

abilities.name: Swift Swim
abilities.effect: Doubles Speed during rain.
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in rain.

abilities.name: Intimidate
abilities.effect: Lowers opponents' Attack one stage upon entering battle.
abilities.flavor_text: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it intimidates opposing Pokémon and makes them cower, lowering their Attack stats.
